Project Manager - Highways

Job details

Posted 20 June 2026
Salary £500 - £600 per day
LocationManchester
Job type Contract - Full Time
Job duration12 Months
Discipline Highways, Transport & Infrastructure
ReferenceJO0000099999

Job description

An exciting opportunity for an experienced Project Manager to lead delivery of major highways improvement schemes across Greater Manchester.

You will be responsible for:

  • Managing project budgets and programmes
  • Coordinating with highways authority clients
  • Leading multidisciplinary teams

The rate on offer is £500 - £600 per day outside IR35. Contract duration 12 months with potential to extend.
